["lfil. ~. ln/2005-~] v;. -m. ~. ~ (~) 2077 GI/2005 MINlS'IRY OF WA1ER RFSOURCF.S N011FICAUON New Delhi, the 12th July, 2005 S.O. 980(E).-When:as, theCauveryWaterDisputes Tnounal was constituted on 02-06-1990 vide Notification No. S. 0. 437{E)underSection4ofiheinter-State Water Disputes Act 1956 (33 ofl956) forthe adiudication of the water disputes regarding inter-State.river Cauvery and river valley thereof. And whereas the said Act was !imended with effect from 06-08-2002, whereby submission of report and decision, under sub-section (2) of Section 5 of the said Act, by the Tribunal was made tinie bound. And whereas as a result of said amendment, the Cauvery Water Disputes Tnlnmal is required.to submit its report and decision, wider sub-section (2) of Section 5 of the said Act, on or before 5th August, 2005. . And whereas Cauvery Water Disputes Tn'bunalhas requested to ext.end the period of submission ofreport and decision for a further period of one year with effect from 6th August, 2005. Now, therefore, in exercise of power conferred by proviso to sub-section (2) of Section 5 Qfthe said Act, the · Central Government hereby extends the period of submission of report and decision by the Cauvery Water Disputes Tn'bunal for a fmther period of one year with effect from 6th August, 2005. [F. No. l/111005-BMJ AD.
